  • Overview

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AlertingService
    Service responsible for monitoring budgets and generating alerts.
    AlertingService.AlertLevel
    Alert levels for budget usage.
    AlertingService.BudgetAlert
    Record representing a budget alert.
    AuthService
    Service responsible for user authentication and session handling.
    Budget
    Represents a budget for a specific category for a user.
    BudgetCycle
    Represents a budget cycle for a user.
    BudgetRepository
    Repository class for managing Budget entities in the database.
    BudgetService
    Service responsible for managing budgets, budget cycles, and financial calculations such as expenses and limits.
    Category
    Represents a transaction category.
    CategoryRepository
    Repository class for managing Category entities.
    CycleRepository
    Repository class for managing BudgetCycle entities.
    Goal
    Represents a financial goal for a user.
    GoalRepository
    Repository class for managing Goal entities.
    GoalService
    Service responsible for managing financial goals.
    RolloverEngine
    Engine responsible for handling budget rollover logic.
    SessionManager
    Singleton class responsible for managing user sessions.
    SQLiteDatabase
    Singleton class for managing SQLite database connection and operations.
    Transaction
    Represents a financial transaction (income or expense).
    TransactionRepository
    Repository class for managing Transaction entities.
    User
    Represents a user in the system.
    UserRepository
    Repository class for managing User entities.
    UserSettings
    Represents user preferences and settings.
    UserSettingsRepository
    Repository class responsible for managing user settings in the database.
    ValidationService
    Service responsible for validating user input such as email, password, amounts, and dates.
